subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye ever remain occupied with the remembrance of God and be detached from aught else, for the True One, exalted be His glory, never [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لازال بذکر الله مشغول باشید و از دونش فارغ و حق جل کبریائه هرگز
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
